title: Schauwerk Miro app asset lifecycle v1
goal: Make the verified Schauwerk Companion Developer App icons deterministic, repository-controlled and reproducibly deployable without changing scopes, app identity or runtime behavior.
completion: Outline and colored Miro app icons live in the Schauwerk repository with deterministic generation or canonical source files and digest tests.
The release or operator contract documents exact icon dimensions, monochrome outline requirements, upload procedure and readback.
The existing private Developer App is updated from the repository assets and the authenticated Education-team catalogue renders the expected icon.
No additional Miro scope, team removal, app recreation or paid provider feature is introduced.

metadata.live_finding: The verified app icons currently exist only as local evidence files and provider metadata, not as canonical repository assets.
does_not_establish: that the current provider icons are missing or broken
permission to recreate the Miro app
permission to remove the app for the team
